scripts.dev: npm run kill:ports 2>/dev/null; concurrently -n server,frontend -c blue,green --kill-others "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.kill:ports: lsof -ti:3001 2>/dev/null | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti:5173 2>/dev/null | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti:5174 2>/dev/null | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
